HelpText:
Just a bunch of general game tweaks to make your game experience better/easier.
For more information, read each tweaks tooltip.
DisableRenderHelp:
This will disable your 3D rendering to minimize your GPU load but keeps the whole UI intact.
To get the best result, add a framerate limit of 30 FPS to it.
There may be other plugins which are forcing this state, so if this is set to something you did not expect, it's not my fault.
If you don't want other plugins to force their state on your, use the checkbox below!

THIS IS NON-PERSISTENT AND WILL RESET ON EXITING THE GAME OR DISABLING THE PLUGIN!
ForceRenderHelp:
Enable this if you don't give a shit about other plugins trying to set the render mode and you want Henchman to be the single point of responsiblity!

THIS IS NON-PERSISTENT AND WILL RESET ON EXITING THE GAME OR DISABLING THE PLUGIN!
